description: The ScreenViewPermissions component is a Permissions type component that can apply rules for what certain roles in a session can do with views like third person, free cam, or UI targetting.

fields.ListMode: How to filter and handle the list of ``ViewFilters`` for the selected roles.
fields.ViewFilters: A list of targetting views to check a user with the selected role(s) with and act accordingly on if they are using one in the list.
